message:
feat(tests): add obligation proof integration test suite (bd-1xwvk.4)

Cross-module integration tests validating all three proof modules
(separation logic, no-aliasing, no-leak) agree on clean/broken traces.
Covers: cross-module consistency, dynamic aliasing/leak checks at scale
(100+ permits, 50 regions), cancellation path coverage, mutation testing
(6 mutations), cross-obligation interaction, property-based tests
(3 proptests with random lifecycles), and prover reuse isolation.

37 tests total including 3 proptest suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
